headline: BD to Announce Financial Results for its Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026
summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced that BD management will host an audio webcast at 8 a.m. ET on Thursday, May 7, 2026 to discuss the Company's financial results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2026, which ended on March 31, 2026, and to provide an update on its operations and strategy. The audio webcast can be accessed at BD's investor relations website at www.bd.com/investors, and a replay will be made available sh

headline: Rick Byrd to Retire from BD
summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced that Richard (Rick) Byrd has informed the company of his intent to retire after nearly 25 years with BD.

raw.headline: Rick Byrd to Retire from BD
raw.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced that Richard (Rick) Byrd has informed the company of his intent to retire after nearly 25 years with BD.

headline: BD Files for CE Mark of Liverty TIPS Stent for Portal Hypertension
summary: BDX seeks CE Mark for its Liverty TIPS Stent Graft, a next-gen device aimed at improving portal hypertension treatment and expanding its European footprint.

raw.headline: BD Files for CE Mark of Liverty TIPS Stent for Portal Hypertension
raw.summary: BDX seeks CE Mark for its Liverty TIPS Stent Graft, a next-gen device aimed at improving portal hypertension treatment and expanding its European footprint.

headline: For Women Managing Nighttime Incontinence, Better Sleep and Comfort Start with BD® PureWick® Urine Collection System
summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced new clinical findings revealing that women managing nighttime urinary incontinence reported better sleep and greater overall comfort when using the BD PureWick® Urine Collection System. According to the study, published in the Journal of Clinical Medicine, participants highlighted the system's ease of use and the non-invasive design of the PureWick® Flex Female External Catheter as key fa
